/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/AuthServiceHelper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/ExecutionReportDataReaderListenerImpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/FileLog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/LogonDataReaderListenerImpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/LogoutDataReaderListenerImpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/MarketDataIncrementalRefreshDataReaderListenerImpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/MarketDataSnapshotFullRefreshDataReaderListenerImpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/OrderCancelRejectDataReaderListenerImpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/OrderMassCancelReportDataReaderListenerImpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/SecurityListDataReaderListenerImpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/SocketAcceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/SocketConnection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FIXGateway.dir/main.cpp.o -o FIXGateway   -L/home/ianngulube/Documents/Code/cpp/Experimental_2/DistributedATS/build/dds/lib  -L/home/ianngulube/Documents/Code/cpp/Experimental_2/DistributedATS/build/quickfix/lib  -L/home/ianngulube/Documents/Code/cpp/Experimental_2/DistributedATS/build/log4cxx/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ianngulube/Documents/Code/cpp/Experimental_2/DistributedATS/build/dds/lib:/home/ianngulube/Documents/Code/cpp/Experimental_2/DistributedATS/build/quickfix/lib:/home/ianngulube/Documents/Code/cpp/Experimental_2/DistributedATS/build/log4cxx/lib:/home/ianngulube/Documents/Code/cpp/Experimental_2/DistributedATS/build/GenTools/idl: ../../GenTools/idl/libDistributedATSLib.so -lquickfix -llog4cxx /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 -lfastcdr -lfastdds
